title: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) and Assago sign MoU to Develop India's First Indigenous Green Urea Plant at Pudimadaka Green Hydrogen Hub
content: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a subsidiary of Indiaâ€™s largest power utility NTPC Ltd., and Assago Industries Pvt. Ltd. (Assago), a fast-growing player in bio-energy and sustainable manufacturing, today announced the signing of a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to develop and operationalize Indiaâ€™s first large-scale Green Urea production ecosystem within the upcoming Green Hydrogen Hub at Pudimadaka, Andhra Pradesh. Under the MoU, NGEL will supply Green Ammonia, COâ‚‚, RE power, and other utilities to Assago, enabling the production of Green Urea using clean, renewable feedstock. The collaboration aims to accelerate Indiaâ€™s transition toward sustainable fertilizer production and contribute significantly to the nationâ€™s Atma Nirbhar Bharat vision.
author: Analysts Account
